heading: Stay Connected This Week
introduction: Here are a few important things happening this week at Irving College Baptist Church.

sermon.title: Sunday Morning Worship
sermon.description: Join us as we worship together and study God's Word.

wednesdayMeal.title: Wednesday Fellowship Meal
wednesdayMeal.description: Come enjoy a meal and fellowship before Bible study.

bibleStudy.title: Wednesday Bible Study
bibleStudy.description: Bible study opportunities are available for adults, students, and children.

announcement.title: Church Announcement
announcement.description: Check back soon for this week's featured announcement.

memoryVerse.text: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing.
